title: Trident Revamp
description: Give tridents a new look with this pack!
body:
# ikili_kartal's Trident Revamp

![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4f77913deba311084118857f2caa0435bc6f00c.png)
**This resource pack does not support vanilla Minecraft. You need to download [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to make sure that this resource pack is working.**

![CONTENT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fdf075465ff36a1343d5578d6c75f83fed1f55b7.png)

This resource pack redesigns tridents with a fresh, vanilla-like 3D model, replacing the default simple three-spiked stick, including a brand new inventory look. It makes your tridents look far more modern and unique. It also glows if you use a shader pack.

![Trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1588424fac025d85e46013f13a26c5da82019bf1_0.webp)

![TOOLS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6835e83028e9cc8714e96f85e6e540e691a5df6.png)
**3D models**
- Titles and model are created in [Blockbench](https://web.blockbench.net)
- Cinematic shots are created in [Blender](https://www.blender.org)

**2D images**
- Advertisement content are created in [Affinity](https://www.affinity.studio)
- Textures are created in [Pixilart](https://WWW.pixilart.com)
![Cool screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b37818d4e4bd754a36689fe85cbfb4d3697c07b6.png)

**i really love free stuff**

![LICENSE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50e67e57845849c4a8af03474b242fcb65b01273.png)

For more information you can check [our repository](https://github.com/NumanTheHuman/Trident-Revamp-Repository).
